Shop with confidence knowing that your satisfaction is our top priority.

settings.heading: Shipping & Return
settings.content:
Order Fulfillment & Multiple Warehouses
To ensure you receive your products as quickly as possible, we partner with several warehouses and suppliers around the world. Depending on the item(s) you order, they may be shipped from different locations. This means your order may arrive in separate packages if you have ordered multiple items. Each package will have its own tracking information.

As part of our commitment to an exceptional shopping experience, we are pleased to offer free shipping worldwide.

Processing time: We strive for a swift preparation process and orders are typically processed and dispatched within 2-4 business days so that customers can receive their items promptly.

Free Shipping time: The timeline below provided is an estimate, and actual shipping times may vary depending on item availability, order volume, and the final destination. 

  • AU: 4 to 9 business days 
  • US: 6 to 20 business days 
  • UK: 6 to 12 business days
  • EU: 6 to 15 business days
  • Rest of the World: 6 to 20 business days (please inquire at info@hugbel.com for more details) 


We also offer express shipping options, please inquire at info@hugbel.com before you place the order.

In case you need express delivery, we can arrange at an additional cost, please contact info@hugbel for the quote with a link to your desired product.

Tracking Your Order
Once your order ships, you’ll receive tracking information for each package via email. Feel free to reach out at info@hugbel.com if you have any questions or need further assistance with your tracking details.

Important Note:
As we ship from multiple warehouses, your items may arrive separately and at different times. Rest assured, your order is on its way, and you’ll receive each item as soon as it becomes available.

Return:

We want you to be completely satisfied with your purchase. If you need to return an item, please note the following:

  • Returns are accepted within 30 days of purchase.
  • Items must be in their original condition and packaging.
  • Return shipping costs are the responsibility of the customer.
  • Refunds will be processed within 5-14 business days after we receive the returned item.

For any questions regarding returns, please contact info@hugbel.com

settings.custom_liquid: Trade Program Application

settings.title: Does the product fit my country's electricity standard/plug standard?
settings.text: We are working with suppliers who are specialised in producing products that fit different international standards - we will carefully process the products according to your delivery address - if there's a different requirement please write to info@hugbel.com

settings.title: Is my payment data safe with you?
settings.text: All direct payment gateways adhere to the standards set by PCI-DSS as managed by the PCI Security Standards Council, which is a joint effort of brands like Visa, MasterCard, American Express, and Discover.

settings.title: What do I do if my product is broken during transport?
settings.text:
We strive to package your orders carefully and with appropriate protection to ensure you always an undamaged delivery.

In the event that the goods arrive at their destination broken or damaged, we will replace the product at our expense.

settings.title: How long does it take to get my products?
settings.text:
Processing time: We strive for a swift preparation process and orders are typically processed and dispatched within 2-4 business days so that customers can receive their items promptly.

Free Shipping time: The timeline below provided is an estimate, and actual shipping times may vary depending on item availability, order volume, and the final destination. 

  • AU: 5 to 10 business days 
  • US: 6 to 20 business days 
  • UK: 6 to 12 business days
  • EU: 6 to 12 business days
  • Rest of the World: 6 to 20 business days (please inquire at info@hugbel.com for more details) 

In case you need express delivery, we can arrange at an additional cost, please contact info@hugbel for the quote with a link to your desired product before placing an order.

settings.title: Do you offer warranty for your products?
settings.text:
Our warranty provides a 2 year guarantee against manufacturer defects.

The guarantee covers any manufacturing, design, or material defect.


It does not cover blows, improper use, or other issues that are not attributable to a manufacturer defects.

All our products are subject to quality control.

settings.title: How can i reach you if i have other questions?
settings.text: If you have any further questions or concerns that we haven't highlighted, please do not hesitate to contact us at info@hugbel.com - we're here to help!

settings.heading: Installation
settings.content:
• Cover furniture with outdoor covers when left outside during inclement weather or when not in use. Make sure furniture is completely dry before covering.
  • Wash frame with a mild solution of soap and water; rinse with clean water and dry thoroughly.
  • Wipe spills with a clean dry cloth.
  • Avoid the use of harsh cleaners and abrasives.
